name: 2pk Wave Medium Decorative Basket Cream - Brightroom™
description:
Store items out of sight with the 2-Pack of Wave Medium Decorative Baskets from Brightroom™. This set of two baskets come in a medium size to give you ample space for storing all your essentials. Designed in a rectangle shape, the cream baskets feature a wave pattern for an elegantly textured look. Made of plastic, these decorative baskets are compatible with the 13-inch cube storage system. Plus, they have side cutout handles for easy movement from one room to another.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
